description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the continuumio/miniconda3 Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named conda_build in the build stage that first installs conda-build with `conda install -y conda-build`, then applies the patch `patch -p1 < remove_pip_pyqt5.patch`, and finally runs `conda build -c defaults .` to build the package defined in the recipe. Cache the conda package directory `~/.conda/pkgs` to speed up subsequent runs, and publish the generated `.tar.bz2` package file from `conda-bld/*` as an artifact. The job runs on all branches without additional rules or services.
